name: Stavanger Golfklubb

course.signatureHole: Park- og skogslandskap ved Store Stokkavann
course.scenicHole: Park- og skogslandskap ved Store Stokkavann
course.viewDescription: Stavanger Golfklubb - aktiv og tradisjonsrik golfklubb grunnlagt 1956. 18-hulls parkbane designet av Fred Smith, 5 km fra Stavanger sentrum ved Store Stokkavann. Par 71, lett kupert terreng med vannhindringer. Vanskelighetsgrad moderat-utfordrende. Driving range, simulator, Café 19th Hole, Gårdsmat restaurant, treningsområder, pro shop, konferanserom.
course.signatureHole_en: Parkland and woodland setting at Store Stokkavann
course.scenicHole_en: Parkland and woodland setting at Store Stokkavann
course.viewDescription_en: Stavanger Golf Club - An active, tradition-rich golf club for all. 18-hole parkland course designed by Fred Smith, founded 1956. Par 71, length 5,758 m (white), 5,551 m (yellow). Situated 5 km from Stavanger city centre in tranquil surroundings near Store Stokkavann. Gently undulating terrain with water hazards. Moderate to challenging difficulty.

description: Stavanger Golfklubb - En aktiv og tradisjonsrik golfklubb for alle. 18-hulls parkbane designet av Fred Smith, grunnlagt 1956. Par 71, lengde 5758m (hvit), 5551m (gul). Ligger 5 km fra Stavanger sentrum i rolige omgivelser nær Store Stokkavann. Lett kupert terreng med vannhindringer. Vanskelighetsgrad moderat til utfordrende.

2025.greenFeeDescription: 18 hull: 850 kr (hverdager 08:00-19:00 og helg). Early Bird (hverdager før 08:00): 650 kr. Twilight (hverdager etter 19:00): 650 kr. 9 hull: 390 kr (hverdager før 08:00), 510 kr (etter 08:00 og helg). Medlemsrabatt: 5 stk greenfee via GolfMore for 2750 kr.
2025.notes: GolfMore-app med greenfee-tilbud for medlemmers gjester. Buggy kun for medisinske årsaker.
2025.greenFeeDescription_en: 18 holes: 850 kr (weekdays 08:00-19:00 and weekends). Early Bird (weekdays before 08:00): 650 kr. Twilight (weekdays after 19:00): 650 kr. 9 holes: 390 kr (weekdays before 08:00), 510 kr (after 08:00 and weekends). Member discount: 5 green fees via GolfMore for 2,750 kr.
2025.notes_en: GolfMore app with green fee offers for members' guests. Buggy for medical reasons only.

2026.greenFeeDescription: 18 hull: 850 kr (hverdager 08:00-19:00 og helg). Early Bird (hverdager før 08:00): 650 kr. Twilight (hverdager etter 19:00): 650 kr. 9 hull: 390 kr (hverdager før 08:00), 510 kr (etter 08:00 og helg). Medlemsrabatt: 5 stk greenfee via GolfMore for 2750 kr.
2026.notes: GolfMore-app med greenfee-tilbud for medlemmers gjester. Buggy kun for medisinske årsaker.

Twilight (weekdays after 19:00): 650 kr. 9 holes: 390 kr (weekdays before 08:00), 510 kr (after 08:00 and weekends). Member discount: 5 green fees via GolfMore for 2,750 kr.

2025.description: Ektefelle/samboer Ung Voksen (20-34 år): 6 550 kr/år (588 kr/mnd)
2025.description_en: Spouse/partner young adult (20-34 years): 6,550 kr/year (588 kr/month)

2025.description: Student/vernepliktig: 4 800 kr/år (442 kr/mnd). Kun for tidligere SGK junior medlemmer, opp til 26 år.
2025.description_en: Student/military service: 4,800 kr/year (442 kr/month). Only for former SGK junior members, up to 26 years.

2025.description: VTG I (Nybegynner): 5 275 kr/år (482 kr/mnd). Kun for kursdeltagere hos SGK.
2025.description_en: Get Into Golf I (Beginner): 5,275 kr/year (482 kr/month). Only for course participants at SGK.

2025.description: Fjernmedlem: 6 330 kr/år (570 kr/mnd). Fast bosted 8+ mil fra klubben. Gir spillerett, men ikke tilgang til TopNordic Golf.
2025.description_en: Distance member: 6,330 kr/year (570 kr/month). Permanent residence 80+ km from the club. Gives playing rights but no access to TopNordic Golf.

2025.description: Passiv medlem: 3 000 kr/år. Inkluderer to greenfee-billetter, men gir ikke full spillerett.
2025.description_en: Passive member: 3,000 kr/year. Includes two green fee vouchers but does not give full playing rights.

description_en: Stavanger Golf Club - An active, tradition-rich golf club for all. 18-hole parkland course designed by Fred Smith, founded 1956. Par 71, length 5,758 m (white), 5,551 m (yellow). Situated 5 km from Stavanger city centre in tranquil surroundings near Store Stokkavann. Gently undulating terrain with water hazards. Moderate to challenging difficulty.
